2051 for (const auto &import : module.info->imports) {
2052 if (!import.moduleAlias.empty() && import.targetModuleIds.size() != 1) {
2053 if (!allowIncomplete) {
2054 error(import.span, "Module alias imports are only allowed when the "
2055 "path resolves to a single module.");
2056 }
2057 continue;
2058 }
2059
2060 for (const auto &targetId : import.targetModuleIds) {
2061 auto targetIt = modules_.find(targetId);
2062 if (targetIt == modules_.end()) {
2063 continue;
2064 }
2065
2066 auto &target = targetIt->second;
2067 auto alias = import.moduleAlias.empty() ? target.info->moduleName
2068 : import.moduleAlias;
2069
2070 auto existingOwner = namespaceOwners.find(alias);
2071 if (existingOwner != namespaceOwners.end() &&
2072 existingOwner->second != targetId) {
2073 if (!allowIncomplete) {
2074 error(import.span, "Import namespace '" + alias +
2075 "' is ambiguous because multiple files share "
2076 "that module name.");
2077 }
2078 continue;
2079 }
2080
2081 if (!module.scope->lookupLocal(alias)) {
2082 module.scope->declare(alias, target.symbol);
2083 namespaceOwners[alias] = targetId;
2084 } else if (module.scope->lookupLocal(alias) != target.symbol) {
2085 if (!allowIncomplete) {
2086 error(import.span, "Cannot import module '" + alias +
2087 "' because that name is already declared in "
2088 "the current file.");
2089 }
2090 continue;
2091 }
2092
2093 if (import.bindings.empty()) {
2094 if (import.visibility == Visibility::Public) {
2095 module.symbol->exports[alias] = target.symbol;
2096 for (const auto &exported : target.symbol->exports) {
2097 module.symbol->exports[exported.first] = exported.second;
2098 }
2099 }
2100 continue;
2101 }
2102
2103 if (import.targetModuleIds.size() != 1) {
2104 if (!allowIncomplete) {
2105 error(import.span, "Selective imports are only allowed when the path "
2106 "resolves to a single module.");
2107 }
2108 continue;
2109 }
2110
2111 for (const auto &binding : import.bindings) {
2112 auto exportedIt = target.symbol->exports.find(binding.sourceName);
2113 if (exportedIt == target.symbol->exports.end()) {
2114 if (allowIncomplete) {
2115 continue;
2116 }
2117 auto memberIt = target.symbol->members.find(binding.sourceName);
2118 if (memberIt != target.symbol->members.end() &&
2119 memberIt->second->visibility != Visibility::Public) {
2120 error(import.span, "Member '" + binding.sourceName +
2121 "' of module '" + alias + "' is private.");
2122 } else {
2123 error(import.span, "Module '" + alias + "' has no public member '" +
2124 binding.sourceName + "'.");
2125 }
2126 continue;
2127 }
2128
2129 auto existing = module.scope->lookupLocal(binding.localName);
2130 if (existing && existing != exportedIt->second) {
2131 if (!allowIncomplete) {
2132 error(import.span, "Imported name '" + binding.localName +
2133 "' conflicts with an existing declaration "
2134 "in the current file.");
2135 }
2136 continue;
2137 }
2138 if (!existing) {
2139 module.scope->declare(binding.localName, exportedIt->second);
2140 }
2141 if (import.visibility == Visibility::Public) {
2142 module.symbol->exports[binding.localName] = exportedIt->second;
2143 }
2144 }
2145 }
2146 }
2147}

4596 auto *calleeId = dynamic_cast<ConstId *>(node.callee_.get());
4597 if (!calleeId) {
4598 return false;
4599 }
4600
4601 const bool isLock = calleeId->value_ == "lock";
4602 const bool isAlive = calleeId->value_ == "alive";
4603 if (!isLock && !isAlive) {
4604 return false;
4605 }
4606
4607 if (node.params_.size() != 1 || node.params_[0]->isRef ||
4608 node.params_[0]->isSpread || !node.params_[0]->name.empty()) {
4609 error(node.span, "'" + calleeId->value_ +
4610 "' expects exactly one positional argument.");
4611 return true;
4612 }
4613
4614 auto weakExpr =
4615 bindExpressionWithExpected(node.params_[0]->value.get(), nullptr);
4616 if (!weakExpr) {
4617 return true;
4618 }
4619
4620 if (weakExpr->type->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Class) {
4621 error(node.params_[0]->value->span,
4622 "'" + calleeId->value_ + "' expects a weak class reference.");
4623 return true;
4624 }
4625
4626 auto weakClassType = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(weakExpr->type);
4627 if (!weakClassType->isWeak()) {
4628 error(node.params_[0]->value->span,
4629 "'" + calleeId->value_ + "' expects a weak class reference.");
4630 return true;
4631 }
4632

4635 std::make_unique<BoundWeakAliveExpression>(std::move(weakExpr)));

4637 }
4638
4639 auto strongType = std::make_shared<zir::ClassType>(*weakClassType);
4640 strongType->setWeak(false);
4641 expressionStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundWeakLockExpression>(
4642 std::move(weakExpr), strongType));
4643 return true;
4644}

1411 inferFrom =
1412 [&](const std::shared_ptr<zir::Type> &paramType,
1413 const std::shared_ptr<zir::Type> &argType) -> bool {
1414 if (!paramType || !argType) {
1415 return true;
1416 }
1417

1419 auto rec = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::RecordType>(paramType);
1420
1421 if (isVariadicViewType(paramType)) {
1422 const auto &fields = rec->getFields();
1423 if (fields.size() < 2 ||
1424 fields[0].type->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Pointer) {
1425 return false;
1426 }
1427 auto dataPtr =
1428 std::static_pointer_cast<zir::PointerType>(fields[0].type);
1429
1430 if (argType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Array) {
1431 auto aa = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ArrayType>(argType);
1432 return inferFrom(dataPtr->getBaseType(), aa->getBaseType());
1433 }
1434
1435 if (argType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Record &&
1436 isVariadicViewType(argType)) {
1437 auto argRec = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::RecordType>(argType);
1438 const auto &argFields = argRec->getFields();
1439 if (argFields.size() < 2 ||
1440 argFields[0].type->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Pointer) {
1441 return false;
1442 }
1443 auto argDataPtr =
1444 std::static_pointer_cast<zir::PointerType>(argFields[0].type);
1445 return inferFrom(dataPtr->getBaseType(), argDataPtr->getBaseType());
1446 }
1447 }
1448
1449 if (rec->isGenericInstance() && argType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Record) {
1450 auto argRecord = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::RecordType>(argType);
1451 if (!argRecord->isGenericInstance() ||
1452 rec->getGenericBaseName() != argRecord->getGenericBaseName() ||
1453 rec->getGenericArguments().size() !=
1454 argRecord->getGenericArguments().size()) {
1455 return false;
1456 }
1457 for (size_t i = 0; i < rec->getGenericArguments().size(); ++i) {
1458 if (!inferFrom(rec->getGenericArguments()[i],
1459 argRecord->getGenericArguments()[i])) {
1460 return false;
1461 }
1462 }
1463 return true;
1464 }
1465 auto paramName = rec->getName();
1466 std::string normalizedParamName =
1467 (!paramName.empty() && paramName[0] == '%')
1468 ? paramName.substr(1)
1469 : paramName;
1470 auto isGenericName = std::find(function.genericParameterNames.begin(),
1471 function.genericParameterNames.end(),
1472 normalizedParamName) !=
1473 function.genericParameterNames.end();
1474 if (isGenericName) {
1475 auto it = bindings.find(normalizedParamName);
1476 if (it == bindings.end()) {
1477 bindings[normalizedParamName] = argType;
1478 return true;
1479 }
1480 return it->second->toString() == argType->toString();
1481 }
1482 return true;
1483 }
1484
1485 if (paramType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class) {
1486 auto cls = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(paramType);
1487 if (cls->isGenericInstance() && argType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class) {
1488 auto argClass = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(argType);
1489 std::shared_ptr<zir::ClassType> matchingArgClass = argClass;
1490 while (matchingArgClass &&
1491 (!matchingArgClass->isGenericInstance() ||
1492 cls->getGenericBaseName() !=
1493 matchingArgClass->getGenericBaseName())) {
1494 matchingArgClass = matchingArgClass->getBase();
1495 }
1496 if (!matchingArgClass ||
1497 matchingArgClass->getGenericArguments().size() !=
1498 cls->getGenericArguments().size()) {
1499 return false;
1500 }
1501 for (size_t i = 0; i < cls->getGenericArguments().size(); ++i) {
1502 if (!inferFrom(cls->getGenericArguments()[i],
1503 matchingArgClass->getGenericArguments()[i])) {
1504 return false;
1505 }
1506 }
1507 return true;
1508 }
1509 auto paramName = cls->getName();
1510 std::string normalizedParamName =
1511 (!paramName.empty() && paramName[0] == '%')
1512 ? paramName.substr(1)
1513 : paramName;
1514 auto isGenericName = std::find(function.genericParameterNames.begin(),
1515 function.genericParameterNames.end(),
1516 normalizedParamName) !=
1517 function.genericParameterNames.end();
1518 if (isGenericName) {
1519 auto it = bindings.find(normalizedParamName);
1520 if (it == bindings.end()) {
1521 bindings[normalizedParamName] = argType;
1522 return true;
1523 }
1524 return it->second->toString() == argType->toString();
1525 }
1526 return true;
1527 }
1528
1529 if (paramType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Pointer &&
1530 argType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Pointer) {
1531 auto pp = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::PointerType>(paramType);
1532 auto ap = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::PointerType>(argType);
1533 return inferFrom(pp->getBaseType(), ap->getBaseType());
1534 }
1535
1536
1537
1538 if (paramType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Array &&
1539 argType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Array) {
1540 auto pa = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ArrayType>(paramType);
1541 auto aa = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ArrayType>(argType);
1542 if (pa->getSize() != aa->getSize()) {
1543 return false;
1544 }
1545 return inferFrom(pa->getBaseType(), aa->getBaseType());
1546 }
1547
1548 return true;
1549 };
1550
1551 size_t fixedCount = function.fixedParameterCount();
1552 for (size_t i = 0; i < arguments.size() && i < fixedCount; ++i) {
1553 if (!inferFrom(function.parameters[i]->type, arguments[i]->type)) {
1554 if (failureReason) {
1555 *failureReason = "conflicting generic type inference";
1556 }
1557 return {};
1558 }
1559 }
1560
1561 for (const auto &name : function.genericParameterNames) {
1562 if (bindings.find(name) == bindings.end()) {
1563 bool filledFromDefault = false;
1564 if (decl) {
1565 auto paramIndex = static_cast<size_t>(
1566 std::distance(function.genericParameterNames.begin(),
1567 std::find(function.genericParameterNames.begin(),
1568 function.genericParameterNames.end(),
1569 name)));
1570 if (paramIndex < decl->genericParams_.size() &&
1571 decl->genericParams_[paramIndex] &&
1572 decl->genericParams_[paramIndex]->defaultType) {
1573 activeGenericBindingsStack_.push_back(bindings);
1574 auto mapped = mapType(*decl->genericParams_[paramIndex]->defaultType);
1575 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();
1576 if (mapped) {
1577 bindings[name] = mapped;
1578 filledFromDefault = true;
1579 }
1580 }
1581 }
1582 if (!filledFromDefault) {
1583 if (failureReason) {

1587 }
1588 }
1589 }
1590
1591 if (decl) {
1592 if (!validateGenericConstraints(decl->genericConstraints_, bindings,
1593 failureReason)) {
1594 return {};

1752 }
1753 if (from->isInteger() && to->isInteger()) {
1754 return "signedness-changing integer conversion";
1755 }

605 return nullptr;

620 param->moduleName, param->visibility);

624 instantiatedParams.push_back(std::move(instParam));
625 }
626
627 auto instantiatedReturn =
628 substituteGenericType(baseFunction->returnType, genericBindingMap);
629
630 auto instantiated = std::make_shared<FunctionSymbol>(
631 baseFunction->name, std::move(instantiatedParams), instantiatedReturn, "",
632 baseFunction->moduleName, baseFunction->visibility, baseFunction->isUnsafe,
633 baseFunction->isCVariadic);
634 instantiated->isMethod = baseFunction->isMethod;
635 instantiated->isStatic = baseFunction->isStatic;
636 instantiated->isConstructor = baseFunction->isConstructor;
637 instantiated->isDestructor = baseFunction->isDestructor;
638 instantiated->vtableSlot = -1;
639 instantiated->ownerTypeName = baseFunction->ownerTypeName;
640 instantiated->isGenericInstantiation = true;
641 instantiated->genericArguments.clear();
642 for (const auto &[name, type] : genericBindings) {
643 instantiated->genericArguments[name] = type;
644 }
645
646 std::string genericSuffix;
647 for (size_t i = 0; i < baseFunction->genericParameterNames.size(); ++i) {
648 if (i != 0) {
649 genericSuffix += "$";
650 }
651 const auto &name = baseFunction->genericParameterNames[i];
652 auto it = std::find_if(
653 genericBindings.begin(), genericBindings.end(),
654 [&](const auto &entry) { return entry.first == name; });
655 if (it == genericBindings.end() || !it->second) {
656 error(callSpan, "Missing binding for generic parameter '" + name + "'.");
657 return nullptr;
658 }
659 genericSuffix += sanitizeTypeName(name + "_" + it->second->toString());
660 }
661 instantiated->linkName = baseFunction->linkName + "$g$" + genericSuffix;
662

667

669 genericInstantiationInProgress_.end(), cacheKey);

676 return instantiated;

682 auto oldFunction = currentFunction_;

684 int oldUnsafeDepth = unsafeDepth_;
685
686 currentModuleId_ = moduleIt->second.info->moduleId;
687 currentScope_ = moduleIt->second.scope;
688 currentFunction_ = instantiated;
689 if (instantiated->isUnsafe) {
690 ++unsafeDepth_;
691 }
692
693 pushScope();
694 for (const auto &param : instantiated->parameters) {
695 if (!currentScope_->declare(param->name, param)) {
696 error(callSpan, "Parameter '" + param->name +
697 "' already declared in generic instantiation.");
698 }
699 }
700
701 activeGenericBindingsStack_.push_back(
702 std::unordered_map<std::string, std::shared_ptr<zir::Type>>(
703 genericBindings.begin(), genericBindings.end()));
704 auto boundBody = bindBody(declIt->second->body_.get(), false);
705 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();
706
707 popScope();
708
709 currentScope_ = oldScope;
710 currentFunction_ = oldFunction;
711 currentModuleId_ = oldModuleId;
712 unsafeDepth_ = oldUnsafeDepth;
713
714 bool hasReturn = blockAlwaysReturns(boundBody.get());
715
716 if (!hasReturn && instantiated->linkName == "main" &&
717 instantiated->returnType->isInteger()) {
718 auto intType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int);
719 auto lit = std::make_unique<BoundLiteral>("0", intType);
720 boundBody->statements.push_back(
721 std::make_unique<BoundReturnStatement>(std::move(lit)));
722 hasReturn = true;
723 }
724
725 if (!hasReturn && instantiated->returnType->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Void) {
726 auto kind = instantiated->returnType->getKind();
727 if (instantiated->returnType->isInteger() || kind == zir::TypeKind::Float ||
728 kind == zir::TypeKind::Bool) {
729 std::string litVal = "0";
730 if (kind == zir::TypeKind::Float)
731 litVal = "0.0";
732 else if (kind == zir::TypeKind::Bool)
733 litVal = "false";
734 auto lit = std::make_unique<BoundLiteral>(litVal, instantiated->returnType);
735 boundBody->statements.push_back(
736 std::make_unique<BoundReturnStatement>(std::move(lit)));
737 }
738
739 _diag.report(callSpan, zap::DiagnosticLevel::Warning,
740 "Generic function '" + instantiated->name +
741 "' has non-void return type but no return on some paths.");
742 }
743
744 boundRoot_->functions.push_back(std::make_unique<BoundFunctionDeclaration>(
745 instantiated, std::move(boundBody)));
746 genericInstantiationEmitted_[instantiated.get()] = true;
747
748 genericInstantiationInProgress_.pop_back();
749 return instantiated;
750}

5563 }
5564 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Float);
5565 }
5566
5567 // Integer promotion: preserve unsignedness when both operands are unsigned,
5568 // and choose width-aware integer kinds instead of always forcing Int64.
5569 if (isUnsignedIntegerType(t1) && isUnsignedIntegerType(t2)) {
5570 int width = std::max(typeBitWidth(t1), typeBitWidth(t2));
5571 if (width <= 8)
5572 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::UInt8);
5573 if (width <= 16)
5574 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::UInt16);
5575 if (width <= 32)

5579

5581 // - preserve unsignedness when the unsigned operand width is >= signed width
5582 // (e.g. Int + UInt -> UInt, Int16 + UInt16 -> UInt16, Int + UInt64 -> UInt64)
5583 // - otherwise use signed, width-aware promotion.

5585 (isSignedIntegerType(t1) && isUnsignedIntegerType(t2))) {
5586 auto unsignedType = isUnsignedIntegerType(t1) ? t1 : t2;
5587 auto signedType = isUnsignedIntegerType(t1) ? t2 : t1;
5588
5589 int unsignedWidth = typeBitWidth(unsignedType);
5590 int signedWidth = typeBitWidth(signedType);
5591
5592 if (unsignedWidth >= signedWidth) {
5593 if (unsignedWidth <= 8)
5594 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::UInt8);
5595 if (unsignedWidth <= 16)
5596 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::UInt16);
5597 if (unsignedWidth <= 32)
5598 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::UInt);
5599 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::UInt64);
5600 }
5601
5602 int width = std::max(unsignedWidth, signedWidth);
5603 if (width <= 8)
5604 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int8);
5605 if (width <= 16)
5606 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int16);
5607 if (width <= 32)
5608 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int);
5609 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int64);
5610 }
5611
5612 // Both signed: keep signed result, width-aware.
5613 int width = std::max(typeBitWidth(t1), typeBitWidth(t2));
5614 if (width <= 8)
5615 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int8);
5616 if (width <= 16)
5617 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int16);
5618 if (width <= 32)

5620 return std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int64);

1000 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();

1002 error(declParam->defaultType->span,
1003 "Unknown default generic type argument in type '" +

1028 cacheKey += ">";

1031 if (cachedIt != genericTypeInstantiations_.end()) {
1032 return cachedIt->second;
1033 }
1034
1035 auto moduleIdIt = typeDeclarationModuleIds_.find(baseSymbol.get());
1036 if (moduleIdIt == typeDeclarationModuleIds_.end()) {

1039 baseSymbol->name + "'.");

1041 }
1042

1050

1053 renderGenericTypeName(baseRecordType->getName(), genericArgs);
1054 auto codegenName =
1055 renderGenericCodegenName(baseRecordType->getCodegenName(), genericArgs);

1058 } else {
1059 instantiatedType = std::make_shared<zir::RecordType>(displayName, codegenName);
1060 }
1061 instantiatedType->setGenericInstance(baseRecordType->getName(),
1062 baseRecordType->getCodegenName(),
1063 genericArgs);
1064
1065 auto instantiatedSymbol = std::make_shared<TypeSymbol>(
1066 baseSymbol->name, instantiatedType, codegenName, baseSymbol->moduleName,
1067 baseSymbol->visibility, baseSymbol->isUnsafe, classDecl != nullptr);
1068 instantiatedSymbol->isGenericInstantiation = true;
1069 instantiatedSymbol->genericArguments = {
1070 genericBindings.begin(), genericBindings.end()};
1071 genericTypeInstantiations_[cacheKey] = instantiatedSymbol;
1072
1073 if (classDecl) {
1074 auto instantiatedClassType =
1075 std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(instantiatedType);
1076 ClassInfo classInfo;
1077 classInfo.typeSymbol = instantiatedSymbol;
1078 classInfo.classType = instantiatedClassType;
1079 classInfo.ownerQualifiedName = instantiatedClassType->getName();
1080 classInfos_[instantiatedClassType->getName()] = classInfo;
1081 }
1082
1083 int oldUnsafeTypeContextDepth = unsafeTypeContextDepth_;
1084 int oldExternTypeContextDepth = externTypeContextDepth_;
1085 auto oldScope = currentScope_;
1086 auto oldModuleId = currentModuleId_;
1087 if (structDecl && structDecl->isUnsafe_) {
1088 ++unsafeTypeContextDepth_;
1089 }
1090 if (structDecl) {
1091 ++externTypeContextDepth_;
1092 }
1093
1094 currentScope_ = moduleIt->second.scope;
1095 currentModuleId_ = moduleIt->second.info->moduleId;
1096
1097 activeGenericBindingsStack_.push_back(genericBindings);
1098 if (classDecl && classDecl->baseType_) {
1099 bool hasOwnCtor = false;
1100 bool hasOwnDtor = false;
1101 for (const auto &methodDecl : classDecl->methods_) {
1102 hasOwnCtor = hasOwnCtor || methodDecl->name_ == "init";
1103 hasOwnDtor = hasOwnDtor || methodDecl->name_ == "deinit";
1104 }
1105 auto baseType = mapType(*classDecl->baseType_);
1106 if (baseType && baseType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class) {
1107 auto instantiatedClassType =
1108 std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(instantiatedType);
1109 auto baseClass = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(baseType);
1110 instantiatedClassType->setBase(baseClass);
1111 auto &classInfo = classInfos_[instantiatedClassType->getName()];
1112 auto baseIt = classInfos_.find(baseClass->getName());
1113 if (baseIt != classInfos_.end()) {
1114 if (!hasOwnCtor) {
1115 classInfo.constructor = baseIt->second.constructor;
1116 }
1117 if (!hasOwnDtor) {
1118 classInfo.destructor = baseIt->second.destructor;
1119 }
1120 classInfo.fields = baseIt->second.fields;
1121 classInfo.methods.insert(baseIt->second.methods.begin(),
1122 baseIt->second.methods.end());
1123 classInfo.nextVirtualSlot = baseIt->second.nextVirtualSlot;
1124 }
1125 for (const auto &field : baseClass->getFields()) {
1126 instantiatedClassType->addField(field.name, field.type, field.visibility);
1127 }
1128 } else if (baseType) {
1129 error(classDecl->baseType_->span, "Base type of class '" + classDecl->name_ +
1130 "' must be a class.");
1131 }
1132 }
1133
1134 const auto &fields =
1135 recordDecl ? recordDecl->fields_
1136 : (structDecl ? structDecl->fields_ : classDecl->fields_);
1137 for (const auto &field : fields) {
1138 auto fieldType = mapType(*field->type);
1139 if (!fieldType) {
1140 error(field->span, "Unknown type: " + field->type->qualifiedName());
1141 fieldType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
1142 }
1143 instantiatedType->addField(field->name, fieldType,
1144 static_cast<int>(field->visibility_));
1145 if (classDecl) {
1146 auto instantiatedClassType =
1147 std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(instantiatedType);
1148 auto &classInfo = classInfos_[instantiatedClassType->getName()];
1149 classInfo.fields[field->name] = std::make_shared<VariableSymbol>(
1150 field->name, fieldType, false, false, field->name,
1151 moduleIt->second.info->moduleName, field->visibility_);
1152 }
1153 }
1154
1155 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();
1156
1157 unsafeTypeContextDepth_ = oldUnsafeTypeContextDepth;
1158 externTypeContextDepth_ = oldExternTypeContextDepth;
1159 currentScope_ = oldScope;
1160 currentModuleId_ = oldModuleId;
1161
1162 if (classDecl) {
1163 auto instantiatedClassType =
1164 std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(instantiatedType);
1165 auto &classInfo = classInfos_[instantiatedClassType->getName()];
1166 auto oldScope = currentScope_;
1167 auto oldModuleId = currentModuleId_;
1168 currentScope_ = moduleIt->second.scope;
1169 currentModuleId_ = moduleIt->second.info->moduleId;
1170
1171 for (const auto &methodDecl : classDecl->methods_) {
1172 if (methodDecl->isUnsafe_) {
1173 ++unsafeTypeContextDepth_;
1174 }
1175
1176 std::unordered_map<std::string, std::shared_ptr<zir::Type>>
1177 methodGenericBindings;
1178 for (const auto &genericParam : methodDecl->genericParams_) {
1179 if (genericParam) {
1180 auto placeholder = std::make_shared<zir::RecordType>(
1181 genericParam->typeName, genericParam->typeName);
1182 methodGenericBindings[genericParam->typeName] = placeholder;
1183 }
1184 }
1185
1186 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<VariableSymbol>> params;
1187 if (!methodDecl->isStatic_) {
1188 params.push_back(std::make_shared<VariableSymbol>(
1189 "self", instantiatedClassType, false, false, "self",
1190 moduleIt->second.info->moduleName, Visibility::Private));
1191 }
1192
1193 activeGenericBindingsStack_.push_back(genericBindings);
1194 if (!methodGenericBindings.empty()) {
1195 activeGenericBindingsStack_.push_back(methodGenericBindings);
1196 }
1197 for (size_t i = 0; i < methodDecl->params_.size(); ++i) {
1198 const auto &p = methodDecl->params_[i];
1199 auto mappedType = mapType(*p->type);
1200 if (!mappedType) {
1201 error(p->span, "Unknown type: " + p->type->qualifiedName());
1202 mappedType =
1203 std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
1204 }
1205 params.push_back(std::make_shared<VariableSymbol>(
1206 p->name, mappedType, false, p->isRef, p->name,
1207 moduleIt->second.info->moduleName, Visibility::Private));
1208 }
1209
1210 std::shared_ptr<zir::Type> retType;
1211 bool isCtor = methodDecl->name_ == "init";
1212 bool isDtor = methodDecl->name_ == "deinit";
1213 if (isDtor && (!methodDecl->params_.empty() || methodDecl->returnType_)) {
1214 error(methodDecl->span,
1215 "Destructor 'deinit' cannot have parameters or a return type.");
1216 }
1217 if (isCtor || isDtor) {
1218 retType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
1219 } else if (methodDecl->returnType_) {
1220 retType = mapType(*methodDecl->returnType_);
1221 } else {
1222 retType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
1223 }
1224 if (!methodGenericBindings.empty()) {
1225 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();
1226 }
1227 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();
1228
1229 if (!retType) {
1230 retType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
1231 }
1232
1233 if (methodDecl->isUnsafe_) {
1234 --unsafeTypeContextDepth_;
1235 }
1236
1237 auto methodSymbol = std::make_shared<FunctionSymbol>(
1238 methodDecl->name_, std::move(params), std::move(retType), "",
1239 moduleIt->second.info->moduleName, methodDecl->visibility_,
1240 methodDecl->isUnsafe_);
1241 for (const auto &genericParam : methodDecl->genericParams_) {
1242 if (genericParam) {
1243 methodSymbol->genericParameterNames.push_back(genericParam->typeName);
1244 }
1245 }
1246 methodSymbol->isMethod = !methodDecl->isStatic_;
1247 methodSymbol->isStatic = methodDecl->isStatic_;
1248 methodSymbol->isConstructor = isCtor;
1249 methodSymbol->isDestructor = isDtor;
1250 methodSymbol->ownerTypeName = instantiatedClassType->getName();
1251 if (methodSymbol->isMethod && !methodSymbol->isStatic &&
1252 !methodSymbol->isConstructor && !methodSymbol->isDestructor) {
1253 auto existingIt = classInfo.methods.find(methodDecl->name_);
1254 if (existingIt != classInfo.methods.end()) {
1255 auto existingMethod =
1256 std::dynamic_pointer_cast<FunctionSymbol>(existingIt->second);
1257 if (existingMethod && existingMethod->vtableSlot >= 0) {
1258 methodSymbol->vtableSlot = existingMethod->vtableSlot;
1259 }
1260 }
1261 if (methodSymbol->vtableSlot < 0) {
1262 methodSymbol->vtableSlot = classInfo.nextVirtualSlot++;
1263 }
1264 }
1265 methodSymbol->linkName =
1266 mangleName(moduleIt->second.info->linkPath.empty()
1267 ? moduleIt->second.info->moduleId
1268 : moduleIt->second.info->linkPath,
1269 instantiatedClassType->getCodegenName() + "$" +
1270 methodDecl->name_ + "$" +
1271 sanitizeTypeName(functionSignatureKey(*methodSymbol)));
1272 functionDeclarationNodes_[methodSymbol.get()] = methodDecl.get();
1273 functionDeclarationModuleIds_[methodSymbol.get()] =
1274 moduleIt->second.info->moduleId;
1275 functionGenericParamNames_[methodSymbol.get()] =
1276 methodSymbol->genericParameterNames;
1277 classInfo.methods[methodDecl->name_] = methodSymbol;
1278 if (isCtor) {
1279 classInfo.constructor = methodSymbol;
1280 } else if (isDtor) {
1281 classInfo.destructor = methodSymbol;
1282 }
1283
1284 if (!methodSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty() &&
1285 !methodSymbol->isGenericInstantiation) {
1286 continue;
1287 }
1288
1289 auto oldScope = currentScope_;
1290 auto oldFunction = currentFunction_;
1291 auto oldModuleId = currentModuleId_;
1292 auto oldClassStack = currentClassStack_;
1293 int oldUnsafeDepth = unsafeDepth_;
1294
1295 currentModuleId_ = moduleIt->second.info->moduleId;
1296 currentScope_ = moduleIt->second.scope;
1297 currentFunction_ = methodSymbol;
1298 currentClassStack_.push_back(instantiatedClassType->getName());
1299 if (methodSymbol->isUnsafe) {
1300 ++unsafeDepth_;
1301 }
1302
1303 pushScope();
1304 for (const auto &param : methodSymbol->parameters) {
1305 if (!currentScope_->declare(param->name, param)) {
1306 error(methodDecl->span,
1307 "Parameter '" + param->name + "' already declared.");
1308 }
1309 }
1310
1311 activeGenericBindingsStack_.push_back(genericBindings);
1312 auto boundBody = bindBody(methodDecl->body_.get(), false);
1313 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();
1314 popScope();
1315
1316 currentScope_ = oldScope;
1317 currentFunction_ = oldFunction;
1318 currentModuleId_ = oldModuleId;
1319 currentClassStack_ = oldClassStack;
1320 unsafeDepth_ = oldUnsafeDepth;
1321
1322 bool hasReturn = blockAlwaysReturns(boundBody.get());
1323
1324 if (!hasReturn &&
1325 methodSymbol->returnType->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Void) {
1326 auto kind = methodSymbol->returnType->getKind();
1327 if (methodSymbol->returnType->isInteger() ||
1328 kind == zir::TypeKind::Float || kind == zir::TypeKind::Bool) {
1329 std::string litVal = "0";
1330 if (kind == zir::TypeKind::Float)
1331 litVal = "0.0";
1332 else if (kind == zir::TypeKind::Bool)
1333 litVal = "false";
1334 auto lit =
1335 std::make_unique<BoundLiteral>(litVal, methodSymbol->returnType);
1336 boundBody->statements.push_back(
1337 std::make_unique<BoundReturnStatement>(std::move(lit)));
1338 }
1339
1340 _diag.report(methodDecl->span, zap::DiagnosticLevel::Warning,
1341 "Function '" + methodDecl->name_ +
1342 "' has non-void return type but no return on some "
1343 "paths.");
1344 }
1345
1346 boundRoot_->functions.push_back(
1347 std::make_unique<BoundFunctionDeclaration>(methodSymbol,
1348 std::move(boundBody)));
1349 }
1350
1351 currentScope_ = oldScope;
1352 currentModuleId_ = oldModuleId;
1353
1354 auto boundRecord = std::make_unique<BoundRecordDeclaration>();
1355 boundRecord->type = instantiatedClassType;
1356 boundRoot_->records.push_back(std::move(boundRecord));
1357 }
1358
1359 return instantiatedSymbol;
1360}

5113

5160

5162 return makeVariadicViewType(base);
5163 }
5164

5168 auto boundSize = std::move(expressionStack_.top());
5169 expressionStack_.pop();
5170 auto evaluated = evaluateConstantInt(boundSize.get());

5186 return std::make_shared<zir::PointerType>(std::move(base));
5187 }
5188

5191 for (const auto &p : typeNode.funPtrParams) {
5192 auto mapped = mapType(*p);
5193 if (!mapped) return nullptr;
5194 params.push_back(std::move(mapped));
5195 }
5196 auto ret = typeNode.funPtrReturn ? mapType(*typeNode.funPtrReturn)
5197 : std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
5198 if (!ret) return nullptr;
5199 return std::make_shared<zir::FunctionPointerType>(std::move(params), std::move(ret));
5200 }
5201

5203 parts.push_back(typeNode.typeName);
5204 auto symbol = resolveQualifiedSymbol(parts, typeNode.span, SymbolKind::Type);
5205 if (symbol && symbol->getKind() == SymbolKind::Type) {
5206 auto typeSymbol = std::static_pointer_cast<TypeSymbol>(symbol);
5207 if (!typeSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty()) {
5208 typeSymbol = instantiateGenericTypeSymbol(typeSymbol, typeNode);
5209 if (!typeSymbol) {
5210 return nullptr;
5211 }
5212 } else if (!typeNode.genericArgs.empty()) {
5213 error(typeNode.span, "Type '" + typeNode.qualifiedName() +
5214 "' is not generic.");
5215 return nullptr;
5216 }
5217 if (typeSymbol->isUnsafe) {
5218 requireUnsafeContext(typeNode.span, "unsafe struct types");
5219 }
5220 if (typeNode.isWeak) {
5221 if (!typeSymbol->isClass ||
5222 typeSymbol->type->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Class) {
5223 error(typeNode.span, "'weak' can only be used with class types.");
5224 return nullptr;
5225 }
5226 auto weakType = std::make_shared<zir::ClassType>(
5227 *std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(typeSymbol->type));
5228 weakType->setWeak(true);
5229 return weakType;
5230 }
5231
5232 auto resolvedType = typeSymbol->type;
5233 if (typeNode.errorType && !typeSymbol->isErrorType) {
5234 error(typeNode.span,
5235 "Type '" + typeNode.qualifiedName() +
5236 "' used as failable error type must be annotated with "
5237 "@error.");
5238 }
5239 return resolvedType;
5240 }
5241
5242 return nullptr;
5243}

2331 hasOwnDtor = hasOwnDtor || methodDecl->name_ == "deinit";
2332 }
2333 auto baseType = mapType(*classDecl->baseType_);
2334 if (baseType && baseType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class) {
2335 auto baseClass = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(baseType);

2338 if (!hasOwnCtor) {
2339 classInfo.constructor = baseIt->second.constructor;
2340 }
2341 if (!hasOwnDtor) {
2342 classInfo.destructor = baseIt->second.destructor;
2343 }

2375

2397 if (isCtor) {

2400 retType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
2401 } else if (methodDecl->returnType_) {
2402 retType = mapType(*methodDecl->returnType_);
2403 } else {
2404 retType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
2405 }

2407 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();
2408 }
2409 if (!retType) {
2410 retType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
2411 }
2412
2413 if (methodDecl->isUnsafe_) {
2414 --unsafeTypeContextDepth_;
2415 }
2416
2417 auto symbol = std::make_shared<FunctionSymbol>(
2418 methodDecl->name_, std::move(params), std::move(retType), "",
2419 module.info->moduleName, methodDecl->visibility_,
2420 methodDecl->isUnsafe_);
2421 for (const auto &genericParam : methodDecl->genericParams_) {
2422 if (genericParam) {
2423 symbol->genericParameterNames.push_back(genericParam->typeName);
2424 }
2425 }
2426 symbol->isMethod = !methodDecl->isStatic_;
2427 symbol->isStatic = methodDecl->isStatic_;
2428 symbol->isConstructor = isCtor;
2429 symbol->isDestructor = isDtor;
2430 symbol->ownerTypeName = classType->getName();
2431 if (symbol->isMethod && !symbol->isStatic && !symbol->isConstructor &&
2432 !symbol->isDestructor) {
2433 auto existingIt = classInfo.methods.find(methodDecl->name_);
2434 if (existingIt != classInfo.methods.end()) {
2435 auto existingMethod =
2436 std::dynamic_pointer_cast<FunctionSymbol>(existingIt->second);
2437 if (existingMethod && existingMethod->vtableSlot >= 0) {
2438 symbol->vtableSlot = existingMethod->vtableSlot;
2439 }
2440 }
2441 if (symbol->vtableSlot < 0) {
2442 symbol->vtableSlot = classInfo.nextVirtualSlot++;
2443 }
2444 }
2445 symbol->linkName =
2446 mangleName(module.info->linkPath.empty() ? module.info->moduleId
2447 : module.info->linkPath,
2448 classDecl->name_ + "$" + methodDecl->name_ + "$" +
2449 sanitizeTypeName(functionSignatureKey(*symbol)));
2450 declaredFunctionSymbols_[methodDecl.get()] = symbol;
2451 functionDeclarationNodes_[symbol.get()] = methodDecl.get();
2452 functionDeclarationModuleIds_[symbol.get()] = module.info->moduleId;
2453 functionGenericParamNames_[symbol.get()] = symbol->genericParameterNames;
2454 classInfo.methods[methodDecl->name_] = symbol;
2455 if (isCtor) {
2456 classInfo.constructor = symbol;
2457 } else if (isDtor) {
2458 classInfo.destructor = symbol;
2459 }
2460 }
2461 } else if (auto extDecl = dynamic_cast<ExtDecl *>(child.get())) {
2462 ++externTypeContextDepth_;
2463 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<VariableSymbol>> params;
2464 for (const auto &p : extDecl->params_) {
2465 if (p->isVariadic) {
2466 error(p->span, "Variadic parameters are only supported in Zap "
2467 "function declarations.");
2468 }
2469 auto mappedType = mapType(*p->type);
2470 if (!mappedType) {
2471 error(p->span, "Unknown type: " + p->type->qualifiedName());
2472 mappedType =
2473 std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
2474 }
2475 params.push_back(std::make_shared<VariableSymbol>(
2476 p->name, mappedType, false, p->isRef, p->name,
2477 module.info->moduleName, Visibility::Private));
2478 }
2479
2480 auto retType =
2481 extDecl->returnType_
2482 ? mapType(*extDecl->returnType_)
2483 : std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
2484 if (!retType) {
2485 error(extDecl->span, "Unknown return type in external function '" +
2486 extDecl->name_ + "'.");
2487 retType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
2488 }
2489 --externTypeContextDepth_;
2490
2491 auto linkName = extDecl->name_;
2492 bool isStdFsModule =
2493 module.info->moduleName == "fs" &&
2494 module.info->sourceName.find("/std/fs.zp") != std::string::npos;
2495 bool isStdIoModule =
2496 module.info->moduleName == "io" &&
2497 module.info->sourceName.find("/std/io.zp") != std::string::npos;
2498 bool isStdPathModule =
2499 module.info->moduleName == "path" &&
2500 module.info->sourceName.find("/std/path.zp") != std::string::npos;
2501 if (isStdFsModule && extDecl->name_ == "mkdir") {
2502 linkName = "zap_fs_mkdir";
2503 } else if (isStdFsModule && extDecl->name_ == "remove") {
2504 linkName = "zap_fs_remove";
2505 } else if (isStdFsModule && extDecl->name_ == "rename") {
2506 linkName = "zap_fs_rename";
2507 } else if (isStdIoModule && extDecl->name_ == "printf") {
2508 linkName = "zap_printf";
2509 } else if (isStdIoModule && extDecl->name_ == "printfln") {
2510 linkName = "zap_printfln";
2511 } else if (isStdPathModule && extDecl->name_ == "basename") {
2512 linkName = "zap_path_basename";
2513 }
2514
2515 auto symbol = std::make_shared<FunctionSymbol>(
2516 extDecl->name_, std::move(params), std::move(retType), linkName,
2517 module.info->moduleName, extDecl->visibility_, false,
2518 extDecl->isCVariadic_);
2519 validateAndApplyFunctionAttributes(*extDecl, symbol, true);
2520 if (symbol->hasNoMangle ||
2521 (symbol->hasExternC && symbol->externAbi == "C")) {
2522 symbol->linkName = symbol->name;
2523 }
2524 auto existing = module.scope->lookupLocal(extDecl->name_);
2525 if (findFunctionBySignature(existing, *symbol)) {
2526 error(extDecl->span,
2527 "External function '" + extDecl->name_ + "' already declared.");
2528 continue;
2529 }
2530 auto overloads = module.scope->declareFunction(extDecl->name_, symbol);
2531 if (!overloads) {
2532 error(extDecl->span, "External function '" + extDecl->name_ +
2533 "' conflicts with an existing declaration.");
2534 continue;
2535 }
2536 declaredFunctionSymbols_[extDecl] = symbol;
2537 module.symbol->members[extDecl->name_] = overloads;
2538 if (extDecl->visibility_ == Visibility::Public) {
2539 auto exportIt = module.symbol->exports.find(extDecl->name_);
2540 std::shared_ptr<OverloadSetSymbol> exportSet;
2541 if (exportIt == module.symbol->exports.end()) {
2542 exportSet = std::make_shared<OverloadSetSymbol>(
2543 extDecl->name_, module.info->moduleName, Visibility::Public);
2544 module.symbol->exports[extDecl->name_] = exportSet;
2545 } else {
2546 exportSet =
2547 std::dynamic_pointer_cast<OverloadSetSymbol>(exportIt->second);
2548 }
2549 if (!exportSet) {
2550 error(extDecl->span, "External function '" + extDecl->name_ +
2551 "' conflicts with an exported declaration.");
2552 } else {
2553 exportSet->addOverload(symbol);
2554 }
2555 }
2556 } else if (auto varDecl = dynamic_cast<VarDecl *>(child.get())) {
2557 if (!varDecl->isGlobal_) {
2558 continue;
2559 }
2560 auto type = mapType(*varDecl->type_);
2561 if (!type) {
2562 error(varDecl->span,
2563 "Unknown type: " + varDecl->type_->qualifiedName());
2564 type = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
2565 }
2566 auto linkName = varDecl->isExternal_
2567 ? varDecl->name_
2568 : mangleName(module.info->linkPath.empty() ? module.info->moduleId
2569 : module.info->linkPath,
2570 varDecl->name_);
2571 auto symbol = std::make_shared<VariableSymbol>(
2572 varDecl->name_, type, false, false,
2573 linkName,
2574 module.info->moduleName, varDecl->visibility_);
2575 symbol->is_external = varDecl->isExternal_;
2576 if (!module.scope->declare(varDecl->name_, symbol)) {
2577 error(varDecl->span,
2578 "Variable '" + varDecl->name_ + "' already declared.");
2579 }
2580 module.symbol->members[varDecl->name_] = symbol;
2581 if (varDecl->visibility_ == Visibility::Public) {
2582 module.symbol->exports[varDecl->name_] = symbol;
2583 }
2584 } else if (auto constDecl = dynamic_cast<ConstDecl *>(child.get())) {
2585 auto type = mapType(*constDecl->type_);
2586 if (!type) {
2587 error(constDecl->span,
2588 "Unknown type: " + constDecl->type_->qualifiedName());
2589 type = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
2590 }
2591 auto symbol = std::make_shared<VariableSymbol>(
2592 constDecl->name_, type, true, false,
2593 mangleName(module.info->linkPath.empty() ? module.info->moduleId
2594 : module.info->linkPath,
2595 constDecl->name_),
2596 module.info->moduleName, constDecl->visibility_);
2597 if (!module.scope->declare(constDecl->name_, symbol)) {
2598 error(constDecl->span,
2599 "Identifier '" + constDecl->name_ + "' already declared.");
2600 }
2601 module.symbol->members[constDecl->name_] = symbol;
2602 if (constDecl->visibility_ == Visibility::Public) {
2603 module.symbol->exports[constDecl->name_] = symbol;
2604 }
2605 }
2606 }
2607}

1831 }

883 {

885 auto boundIt = bindings.find(constraint.parameterName);

888 *failureReason = "missing binding for constrained type parameter '" +
889 constraint.parameterName + "'";
890 }

893 if (!constraint.boundType) {
894 continue;

896

901 if (failureReason) {
902 *failureReason = "unknown constraint type for '" +
903 constraint.parameterName + "'";
904 }

910 "' with type '" + boundIt->second->toString() +
911 "' does not satisfy constraint '" +

917 }

3313 renderTypeForUser(leftType) + "' and '" +
3314 renderTypeForUser(rightType) + "'");
3315 } else {
3316 resultType = getPromotedType(leftType, rightType);
3317 left = wrapInCast(std::move(left), resultType);

3320 } else if (node.op_ == "<<" || node.op_ == ">>") {
3321 if (!leftType->isInteger() || !rightType->isInteger()) {

3323 "Shift operator '" + node.op_ + "' requires integer operands, got '" +

3326 } else {
3327 // Keep the left-hand integer type for shift results.
3328 resultType = leftType;
3329 right = wrapInCast(std::move(right), resultType);

3332 if (*shiftAmount < 0) {

3335 std::to_string(*shiftAmount) + "'.");

3338 static_cast<unsigned>(typeBitWidth(resultType));

3341 "Shift amount '" + std::to_string(*shiftAmount) +

3348 }

3350 node.op_ == "<=" || node.op_ == ">" || node.op_ == ">=") {

3353 isNullType(rightType)) ||

3357 isNullType(leftType) || isNullType(rightType))) {
3358 }
3359
3360 // Reject comparisons of struct types

3362 rightType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Record) {

3370 "Cannot compare '" + renderTypeForUser(leftType) + "' and '" +
3371 renderTypeForUser(rightType) + "'");
3372 } else if (isNullType(leftType) && isPointerType(rightType)) {
3373 left = wrapInCast(std::move(left), rightType);
3374 } else if (isNullType(rightType) && isPointerType(leftType)) {
3375 right = wrapInCast(std::move(right), leftType);
3376 } else if (isNullType(leftType) &&

3378 left = wrapInCast(std::move(left), rightType);

3381 right = wrapInCast(std::move(right), leftType);

3383 (leftType->isFloatingPoint() && rightType->isFloatingPoint()) ||
3384 (leftType->isInteger() && rightType->isFloatingPoint()) ||

2853 if (node.baseType_) {
2854 bool hasOwnCtor = false;
2855 bool hasOwnDtor = false;
2856 for (const auto &method : node.methods_) {
2857 hasOwnCtor = hasOwnCtor || method->name_ == "init";
2858 hasOwnDtor = hasOwnDtor || method->name_ == "deinit";
2859 }
2860 auto baseType = mapType(*node.baseType_);
2861 if (!baseType || baseType->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Class) {
2862 error(node.baseType_->span, "Base type must be a class.");
2863 } else {
2864 auto baseClass = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(baseType);
2865 classType->setBase(baseClass);
2866 auto baseIt = classInfos_.find(baseClass->getName());
2867 if (baseIt != classInfos_.end()) {
2868 if (!hasOwnCtor) {
2869 classInfo.constructor = baseIt->second.constructor;
2870 }
2871 if (!hasOwnDtor) {
2872 classInfo.destructor = baseIt->second.destructor;
2873 }
2874 classInfo.fields = baseIt->second.fields;
2875 classInfo.methods.insert(baseIt->second.methods.begin(),
2876 baseIt->second.methods.end());
2877 for (const auto &field : baseClass->getFields()) {
2878 classType->addField(field.name, field.type, field.visibility);
2879 }
2880 }
2881 }
2882 }
2883
2884 for (const auto &field : node.fields_) {
2885 auto fieldType = mapType(*field->type);
2886 if (!fieldType) {
2887 error(field->span, "Unknown type: " + field->type->qualifiedName());
2888 fieldType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
2889 }
2890 classType->addField(field->name, fieldType,
2891 static_cast<int>(field->visibility_));
2892 classInfo.fields[field->name] = std::make_shared<VariableSymbol>(
2893 field->name, fieldType, false, false, field->name,
2894 modules_[currentModuleId_].info->moduleName, field->visibility_);
2895 }
2896
2897 auto boundRecord = std::make_unique<BoundRecordDeclaration>();
2898 boundRecord->type = classType;
2899 boundRoot_->records.push_back(std::move(boundRecord));
2900
2901 for (const auto &method : node.methods_) {
2902 method->accept(*this);
2903 }
2904
2905 currentClassStack_.pop_back();
2906}

3702 if (match) {
3703 // Build FunctionPointerType from the matched overload's signature
3704 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<zir::Type>> params;

4879 std::unique_ptr<ExpressionNode> conditionAst = nullptr;

4888 auto sliceSymbol = std::make_shared<VariableSymbol>(
4889 sliceName, sliceType, false, false, sliceName, moduleName,
4890 Visibility::Private);

4895 sliceType)));

4898 makeIdExpr(indexName), "<",
4899 std::make_unique<MemberAccessNode>(makeIdExpr(accessName), "len"));
4900 elementAst = std::make_unique<IndexAccessNode>(makeIdExpr(accessName),
4901 makeIdExpr(indexName));
4902 } else if (isVariadicViewType(iterableType)) {
4903 conditionAst = std::make_unique<BinExpr>(
4904 makeIdExpr(indexName), "<",
4905 std::make_unique<MemberAccessNode>(makeIdExpr(accessName), "len"));
4906 elementAst = std::make_unique<IndexAccessNode>(makeIdExpr(accessName),
4907 makeIdExpr(indexName));
4908 } else if (iterableType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class) {
4909 auto lenCall = std::make_unique<FunCall>();
4910 lenCall->callee_ =
4911 std::make_unique<MemberAccessNode>(makeIdExpr(accessName), "len");
4912
4913 conditionAst = std::make_unique<BinExpr>(makeIdExpr(indexName), "<",
4914 std::move(lenCall));
4915
4916 auto atCall = std::make_unique<FunCall>();
4917 atCall->callee_ =
4918 std::make_unique<MemberAccessNode>(makeIdExpr(accessName), "at");
4919 atCall->params_.push_back(
4920 std::make_unique<Argument>("", makeIdExpr(indexName), false, false));
4921 elementAst = std::move(atCall);
4922 } else {
4923 error(node.iterable_->span,
4924 "Type '" + renderTypeForUser(iterableType) +
4925 "' is not iterable in for-in. Expected array, slice, or class "
4926 "with 'len()' and 'at(Int)'.");
4927 popScope();
4928 return;
4929 }
4930
4931 conditionAst->accept(*this);
4932 if (expressionStack_.empty()) {
4933 popScope();
4934 return;
4935 }
4936 auto condition = std::move(expressionStack_.top());
4937 expressionStack_.pop();
4938 if (condition->type->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Bool) {
4939 error(node.span, "For-in condition must be Bool, got '" +
4940 renderTypeForUser(condition->type) + "'");
4941 }
4942

4944 if (expressionStack_.empty()) {
4945 popScope();

4948 auto elementValue = std::move(expressionStack_.top());

4952 std::make_unique<BoundVariableExpression>(indexSymbol),
4953 std::make_unique<BoundBinaryExpression>(
4954 std::make_unique<BoundVariableExpression>(indexSymbol), "+",
4955 std::make_unique<BoundLiteral>("1", intType), intType));
4956
4957 pushScope();

4959 node.itemName_, elementValue->type, false, false, node.itemName_,

4962 error(node.span, "Variable '" + node.itemName_ + "' already declared.");
4963 }
4964
4965 ++loopDepth_;
4966 auto body = bindBody(node.body_.get(), false);
4967 --loopDepth_;
4968
4969 body->statements.insert(
4970 body->statements.begin(),
4971 std::make_unique<BoundVariableDeclaration>(itemSymbol,
4972 std::move(elementValue)));
4973 popScope();
4974
4975 popScope();
4976 statementStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundForStatement>(
4977 std::move(initBlock), std::move(condition), std::move(increment),
4978 std::move(body)));
4979}

void sema::Binder::visit ( ForNode & node)
overridevirtual

Reimplemented from Visitor.

4790 {
4791 pushScope();
4792
4793 node.initializer_->accept(*this);
4794 std::unique_ptr<BoundStatement> initializer = nullptr;
4795 if (!statementStack_.empty()) {
4796 initializer = std::move(statementStack_.top());
4797 statementStack_.pop();
4798 }
4799
4800 node.condition_->accept(*this);
4801 if (expressionStack_.empty()) {
4802 popScope();
4803 return;
4804 }
4805
4806 auto condition = std::move(expressionStack_.top());
4807 expressionStack_.pop();
4808 if (condition->type->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Bool) {
4809 error(node.condition_->span,
4810 "For condition must be Bool, got '" +
4811 renderTypeForUser(condition->type) + "'");
4812 }
4813
4814 auto incrementTargetId = dynamic_cast<ConstId *>(node.increment_->target_.get());
4815 if (!incrementTargetId || incrementTargetId->value_ != node.initializer_->name_) {
4816 error(node.increment_->target_->span,
4817 "For increment must assign to loop variable '" +
4818 node.initializer_->name_ + "'.");
4819 }
4820
4821 node.increment_->accept(*this);
4822 std::unique_ptr<BoundStatement> increment = nullptr;
4823 if (!statementStack_.empty()) {
4824 increment = std::move(statementStack_.top());
4825 statementStack_.pop();
4826 }
4827
4828 ++loopDepth_;
4829 auto body = bindBody(node.body_.get(), true);
4830 --loopDepth_;
4831
4832 popScope();
4833 statementStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundForStatement>(
4834 std::move(initializer), std::move(condition), std::move(increment),
4835 std::move(body)));
4836}

void sema::Binder::visit ( FunCall & node)
overridevirtual

3908 {
3909 if (bindWeakBuiltinCall(node)) {
3910 return;
3911 }
3912
3913 if (auto member = dynamic_cast<MemberAccessNode *>(node.callee_.get())) {
3914 member->left_->accept(*this);
3915 if (expressionStack_.empty()) {
3916 return;
3917 }
3918 auto selfExpr = std::move(expressionStack_.top());
3919 expressionStack_.pop();
3920 if (selfExpr->type->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Class) {
3921 // Not a class method call. Fall through to the normal qualified
3922 // function/module call resolution path below.
3923 } else {
3924 auto classType = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(selfExpr->type);
3925 if (classType->isWeak()) {
3926 error(node.span,
3927 "Weak references cannot be used to call methods directly.");
3928 return;
3929 }
3930 auto infoIt = classInfos_.find(classType->getName());
3931 if (infoIt == classInfos_.end()) {
3932 error(node.span, "Unknown class type: " + classType->getName());
3933 return;
3934 }
3935 auto methodIt = infoIt->second.methods.find(member->member_);
3936 if (methodIt == infoIt->second.methods.end()) {
3937 error(node.span, "Class '" + classType->getName() +
3938 "' has no method '" + member->member_ + "'.");
3939 return;
3940 }
3941 auto funcSymbol =
3942 std::dynamic_pointer_cast<FunctionSymbol>(methodIt->second);
3943 if (!funcSymbol) {
3944 error(node.span, "'" + member->member_ + "' is not a method.");
3945 return;
3946 }
3947 bool methodAllowed =
3948 funcSymbol->visibility == Visibility::Public ||
3949 (!currentClassStack_.empty() &&
3950 currentClassStack_.back() == classType->getName()) ||
3951 (funcSymbol->visibility == Visibility::Protected &&
3952 !currentClassStack_.empty());
3953 if (!methodAllowed) {
3954 error(node.span, "Method '" + member->member_ + "' is not accessible.");
3955 return;
3956 }
3957 if (funcSymbol->isUnsafe) {
3958 requireUnsafeContext(node.span, "unsafe function calls");
3959 }
3960
3961 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> rawArgs;
3962 rawArgs.reserve(node.params_.size());
3963 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.params_.size(); ++i) {
3964 auto arg = bindExpressionWithExpected(node.params_[i]->value.get(), nullptr);
3965 if (!arg) {
3966 return;
3967 }
3968 rawArgs.push_back(std::move(arg));
3969 }
3970
3971 if (!funcSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty()) {
3972 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> inferenceArgs;
3973 if (funcSymbol->isMethod) {
3974 inferenceArgs.push_back(selfExpr->clone());
3975 }
3976 for (const auto &rawArg : rawArgs) {
3977 inferenceArgs.push_back(rawArg->clone());
3978 }
3979 std::string genericBindingFailure;
3980 auto genericBindings = buildGenericBindings(
3981 *funcSymbol, inferenceArgs, node.genericArgs_, node.span,
3982 &genericBindingFailure);
3983 if (genericBindings.empty()) {
3984 error(node.span, "No matching overload for method '" + member->member_ +
3985 "'. " +
3986 (genericBindingFailure.empty()
3987 ? std::string("Generic type binding failed.")
3988 : genericBindingFailure));
3989 return;
3990 }
3991 funcSymbol = ensureGenericFunctionInstantiation(
3992 funcSymbol, orderedGenericBindings(genericBindings), node.span);
3993 if (!funcSymbol) {
3994 error(node.span, "Failed to instantiate generic method '" +
3995 member->member_ + "'.");
3996 return;
3997 }
3998 } else if (!node.genericArgs_.empty()) {
3999 error(node.span, "Method '" + member->member_ +
4000 "' does not accept generic arguments.");
4001 return;
4002 }
4003
4004 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> args;
4005 std::vector<bool> argIsRef;
4006 if (funcSymbol->isMethod) {
4007 args.push_back(std::move(selfExpr));
4008 argIsRef.push_back(false);
4009 }
4010
4011 size_t paramOffset = funcSymbol->isMethod ? 1 : 0;
4012 if (node.params_.size() + paramOffset != funcSymbol->parameters.size()) {
4013 error(node.span,
4014 "No matching overload for method '" + member->member_ + "'.");
4015 return;
4016 }
4017
4018 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.params_.size(); ++i) {
4019 auto arg = rawArgs[i]->clone();
4020 auto expectedType = funcSymbol->parameters[i + paramOffset]->type;
4021 if (!canConvert(arg->type, expectedType)) {
4022 error(node.params_[i]->value->span,
4023 "Cannot convert method argument from '" +
4024 renderTypeForUser(arg->type) + "' to '" +
4025 renderTypeForUser(expectedType) + "'");
4026 return;
4027 }
4028 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), expectedType);
4029 args.push_back(std::move(arg));
4030 argIsRef.push_back(node.params_[i]->isRef);
4031 }
4032
4033 expressionStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundFunctionCall>(
4034 funcSymbol, std::move(args), std::move(argIsRef)));
4035 return;
4036 }
4037 }
4038
4039 std::vector<std::string> calleeParts;
4040 if (!node.callee_ || !extractQualifiedPath(node.callee_.get(), calleeParts)) {
4041 // Try indirect call through function pointer
4042 if (node.callee_) {
4043 node.callee_->accept(*this);
4044 if (!expressionStack_.empty()) {
4045 auto calleeExpr = std::move(expressionStack_.top());
4046 expressionStack_.pop();
4047 if (calleeExpr->type &&
4048 calleeExpr->type->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::FunctionPointer) {
4049 const auto &fpType =
4050 static_cast<const zir::FunctionPointerType &>(*calleeExpr->type);
4051 if (node.params_.size() != fpType.getParams().size()) {
4052 error(node.span, "Function pointer call argument count mismatch.");
4053 return;
4054 }
4055 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> args;
4056 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.params_.size(); ++i) {
4057 auto arg = bindExpressionWithExpected(node.params_[i]->value.get(),
4058 fpType.getParams()[i]);
4059 if (!arg) return;
4060 args.push_back(std::move(arg));
4061 }
4062 expressionStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundIndirectCall>(
4063 std::move(calleeExpr), std::move(args), fpType.getReturnType()));
4064 return;
4065 }
4066 }
4067 }
4068 error(node.span, "Only direct function calls are supported.");
4069 return;
4070 }
4071
4072 auto symbol =
4073 resolveQualifiedSymbol(calleeParts, node.span, SymbolKind::Function);
4074 if (!symbol) {
4075 // Check if it's a variable holding a function pointer
4076 auto varSym = resolveQualifiedSymbol(calleeParts, node.span, SymbolKind::Variable);
4077 if (varSym && varSym->getKind() == SymbolKind::Variable) {
4078 auto varSymbol = std::static_pointer_cast<VariableSymbol>(varSym);
4079 if (varSymbol->type &&
4080 varSymbol->type->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::FunctionPointer) {
4081 const auto &fpType =
4082 static_cast<const zir::FunctionPointerType &>(*varSymbol->type);
4083 if (node.params_.size() != fpType.getParams().size()) {
4084 error(node.span, "Function pointer call argument count mismatch.");
4085 return;
4086 }
4087 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> args;
4088 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.params_.size(); ++i) {
4089 auto arg = bindExpressionWithExpected(node.params_[i]->value.get(),
4090 fpType.getParams()[i]);
4091 if (!arg) return;
4092 args.push_back(std::move(arg));
4093 }
4094 auto calleeExpr = std::make_unique<BoundVariableExpression>(varSymbol);
4095 expressionStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundIndirectCall>(
4096 std::move(calleeExpr), std::move(args), fpType.getReturnType()));
4097 return;
4098 }
4099 }
4100 return;
4101 }
4102
4103 auto candidates = collectOverloads(symbol);
4104 if (candidates.empty()) {
4105 error(node.span, "'" + calleeParts.back() + "' is not a function.");
4106 return;
4107 }
4108
4109 bool seenSpreadArg = false;
4110 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> rawArgs;
4111 std::vector<bool> rawArgIsRef;
4112 std::vector<bool> rawArgIsSpread;
4113 std::vector<std::string> rawArgNames;
4114 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.params_.size(); ++i) {
4115 if (seenSpreadArg) {
4116 error(node.params_[i]->value->span,
4117 "Spread argument must be the last argument in a function call.");
4118 return;
4119 }
4120
4121 auto arg =
4122 bindExpressionWithExpected(node.params_[i]->value.get(), nullptr);
4123 if (!arg)
4124 return;
4125 rawArgNames.push_back(node.params_[i]->name);
4126 rawArgIsRef.push_back(node.params_[i]->isRef);
4127 rawArgIsSpread.push_back(node.params_[i]->isSpread);
4128 if (node.params_[i]->isSpread) {
4129 seenSpreadArg = true;
4130 }
4131 rawArgs.push_back(std::move(arg));
4132 }
4133
4134 struct CandidateMatch {
4135 std::shared_ptr<FunctionSymbol> symbol;
4136 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> arguments;
4137 std::vector<bool> argumentIsRef;
4138 std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression> variadicPack;
4139 std::vector<int> cost;
4140 bool usedExtraArguments = false;
4141 int returnCost = 0;
4142 std::vector<std::string> notes;
4143 };
4144
4145 auto compareCost = [](const CandidateMatch &lhs, const CandidateMatch &rhs) {
4146 if (lhs.cost != rhs.cost) {
4147 return lhs.cost < rhs.cost;
4148 }
4149 if (lhs.returnCost != rhs.returnCost) {
4150 return lhs.returnCost < rhs.returnCost;
4151 }
4152 if (lhs.usedExtraArguments != rhs.usedExtraArguments) {
4153 return !lhs.usedExtraArguments && rhs.usedExtraArguments;
4154 }
4155 if (lhs.symbol->acceptsExtraArguments() !=
4156 rhs.symbol->acceptsExtraArguments()) {
4157 return !lhs.symbol->acceptsExtraArguments() &&
4158 rhs.symbol->acceptsExtraArguments();
4159 }
4160 return false;
4161 };
4162
4163 std::vector<CandidateMatch> matches;
4164 std::shared_ptr<FunctionSymbol> blockedUnsafeMatch = nullptr;
4165 std::vector<std::string> rejectionNotes;
4166 auto expectedReturnType = currentExpectedExpressionType();
4167
4168 for (const auto &funcSymbol : candidates) {
4169 if (!funcSymbol) {
4170 continue;
4171 }
4172
4173 size_t fixedParamCount = funcSymbol->fixedParameterCount();
4174 bool hasExplicitTypeArgs = !node.genericArgs_.empty();
4175 if (hasExplicitTypeArgs &&
4176 node.genericArgs_.size() > funcSymbol->genericParameterNames.size()) {
4177 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
4178 "': explicit generic argument count mismatch");
4179 continue;
4180 }
4181
4182 if (!hasExplicitTypeArgs && !funcSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty()) {
4183 // inference is allowed; no early rejection
4184 }
4185 if (!funcSymbol->acceptsExtraArguments() &&
4186 node.params_.size() != funcSymbol->parameters.size()) {
4187 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
4188 "': wrong argument count");
4189 continue;
4190 }
4191 if (funcSymbol->acceptsExtraArguments() &&
4192 node.params_.size() < fixedParamCount) {
4193 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
4194 "': too few arguments");
4195 continue;
4196 }
4197
4198 CandidateMatch match;
4199 match.symbol = funcSymbol;
4200 match.arguments.resize(fixedParamCount);
4201 match.argumentIsRef.resize(fixedParamCount, false);
4202 std::string genericBindingFailure;
4203 auto genericBindings = buildGenericBindings(
4204 *funcSymbol, rawArgs, node.genericArgs_, node.span,
4205 &genericBindingFailure);
4206 if (!funcSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty() && genericBindings.empty()) {
4207 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
4208 "': " + (genericBindingFailure.empty()
4209 ? "generic type binding failed"
4210 : genericBindingFailure));
4211 continue;
4212 }
4213 bool failed = false;
4214 std::string failureReason;
4215 auto variadicParam = funcSymbol->variadicParameter();
4216 std::vector<int> positionalToParameter(rawArgs.size(), -1);
4217 std::vector<bool> parameterAssigned(funcSymbol->parameters.size(), false);
4218 bool seenNamedArgument = false;
4219
4220 for (size_t i = 0, positionalIndex = 0; i < rawArgs.size(); ++i) {
4221 const bool isSpread = rawArgIsSpread[i];
4222 const bool isNamed = !rawArgNames[i].empty();
4223
4224 if (isSpread) {
4225 if (isNamed) {
4226 failed = true;
4227 failureReason = "named spread arguments are not supported";
4228 break;
4229 }
4230 positionalToParameter[i] = static_cast<int>(fixedParamCount);
4231 continue;
4232 }
4233
4234 if (isNamed) {
4235 seenNamedArgument = true;
4236 bool found = false;
4237 for (size_t paramIndex = 0; paramIndex < fixedParamCount;
4238 ++paramIndex) {
4239 if (funcSymbol->parameters[paramIndex]->name != rawArgNames[i]) {
4240 continue;
4241 }
4242 if (parameterAssigned[paramIndex]) {
4243 failed = true;
4244 failureReason =
4245 "parameter '" + rawArgNames[i] + "' provided more than once";
4246 break;
4247 }
4248 positionalToParameter[i] = static_cast<int>(paramIndex);
4249 parameterAssigned[paramIndex] = true;
4250 found = true;
4251 break;
4252 }
4253 if (failed) {
4254 break;
4255 }
4256 if (!found) {
4257 failed = true;
4258 failureReason = "unknown named argument '" + rawArgNames[i] + "'";
4259 break;
4260 }
4261 continue;
4262 }
4263
4264 if (seenNamedArgument) {
4265 failed = true;
4266 failureReason = "positional arguments cannot follow named arguments";
4267 break;
4268 }
4269
4270 while (positionalIndex < fixedParamCount &&
4271 parameterAssigned[positionalIndex]) {
4272 ++positionalIndex;
4273 }
4274
4275 if (positionalIndex < fixedParamCount) {
4276 positionalToParameter[i] = static_cast<int>(positionalIndex);
4277 parameterAssigned[positionalIndex] = true;
4278 ++positionalIndex;
4279 } else {
4280 positionalToParameter[i] = static_cast<int>(fixedParamCount);
4281 }
4282 }
4283
4284 if (!failed) {
4285 for (size_t paramIndex = 0; paramIndex < fixedParamCount; ++paramIndex) {
4286 if (!parameterAssigned[paramIndex]) {
4287 failed = true;
4288 failureReason = "missing argument for parameter '" +
4289 funcSymbol->parameters[paramIndex]->name + "'";
4290 break;
4291 }
4292 }
4293 }
4294
4295 for (size_t i = 0; i < rawArgs.size(); ++i) {
4296 auto arg = rawArgs[i]->clone();
4297 bool argIsRef = rawArgIsRef[i];
4298 bool argIsSpread = rawArgIsSpread[i];
4299 int parameterIndex = positionalToParameter[i];
4300
4301 if (failed) {
4302 break;
4303 }
4304
4305 if (argIsSpread) {
4306 if (parameterIndex < static_cast<int>(fixedParamCount) || argIsRef ||
4307 !funcSymbol->hasVariadicParameter()) {
4308 failed = true;
4309 failureReason =
4310 "spread arguments can only target a Zap variadic parameter";
4311 break;
4312 }
4313
4314 if (!variadicParam || !variadicParam->variadic_element_type) {
4315 failed = true;
4316 failureReason = "internal error: missing variadic parameter type";
4317 break;
4318 }
4319
4320 auto expectedViewType =
4321 makeVariadicViewType(variadicParam->variadic_element_type);
4322
4323 if (arg->type && arg->type->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Array) {
4324 if (!canConvert(arg->type, expectedViewType)) {
4325 failed = true;
4326 failureReason =
4327 "spread argument type does not match variadic parameter";
4328 break;
4329 }
4330 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), expectedViewType);
4331 } else if (!arg->type || !isVariadicViewType(arg->type) ||
4332 !canConvert(arg->type, expectedViewType)) {
4333 failed = true;
4334 failureReason =
4335 "spread argument type does not match variadic parameter";
4336 break;
4337 }
4338
4339 match.variadicPack = std::move(arg);
4340 match.usedExtraArguments = true;
4341 match.notes.push_back("spread -> variadic pack");
4342 continue;
4343 }
4344
4345 if (parameterIndex >= 0 &&
4346 parameterIndex < static_cast<int>(fixedParamCount)) {
4347 auto expectedType = funcSymbol->parameters[parameterIndex]->type;
4348 if (!genericBindings.empty()) {
4349 expectedType = substituteGenericType(expectedType, genericBindings);
4350 }
4351 const auto &parameter = funcSymbol->parameters[parameterIndex];
4352 if (argIsRef != parameter->is_ref) {
4353 failed = true;
4354 failureReason = "argument for parameter '" + parameter->name +
4355 "' has mismatched ref-ness";
4356 break;
4357 }
4358
4359 if (argIsRef) {
4360 auto varExpr = dynamic_cast<BoundVariableExpression *>(arg.get());
4361 if (!varExpr || arg->type->toString() != expectedType->toString()) {
4362 failed = true;
4363 failureReason = "ref argument for parameter '" + parameter->name +
4364 "' must exactly match type '" +
4365 renderTypeForUser(expectedType) + "'";
4366 break;
4367 }
4368 match.cost.push_back(0);
4369 match.notes.push_back("param " + parameter->name +
4370 ": exact ref match");
4371 } else if (!canConvert(arg->type, expectedType)) {
4372 failed = true;
4373 failureReason = "argument for parameter '" + parameter->name +
4374 "' is not convertible from '" +
4375 renderTypeForUser(arg->type) + "' to '" +
4376 renderTypeForUser(expectedType) + "'";
4377 break;
4378 } else {
4379 int cost = conversionCost(arg->type, expectedType);
4380 if (cost >= 1000) {
4381 failed = true;
4382 failureReason = "argument for parameter '" + parameter->name +
4383 "' is not convertible from '" +
4384 renderTypeForUser(arg->type) + "' to '" +
4385 renderTypeForUser(expectedType) + "'";
4386 break;
4387 }
4388 match.cost.push_back(cost);
4389 match.notes.push_back("param " + parameter->name + ": " +
4390 describeConversion(arg->type, expectedType));
4391 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), expectedType);
4392 }
4393 match.argumentIsRef[parameterIndex] = argIsRef;
4394 match.arguments[parameterIndex] = std::move(arg);
4395 } else if (funcSymbol->hasVariadicParameter()) {
4396 if (argIsRef) {
4397 failed = true;
4398 failureReason = "variadic arguments cannot be passed by ref";
4399 break;
4400 }
4401 auto expectedType = variadicParam->variadic_element_type;
4402 if (!genericBindings.empty()) {
4403 expectedType = substituteGenericType(expectedType, genericBindings);
4404 }
4405 if (!canConvert(arg->type, expectedType)) {
4406 failed = true;
4407 failureReason = "variadic argument is not convertible from '" +
4408 renderTypeForUser(arg->type) + "' to '" +
4409 renderTypeForUser(expectedType) + "'";
4410 break;
4411 }
4412 int cost = conversionCost(arg->type, expectedType);
4413 match.cost.push_back(cost);
4414 match.usedExtraArguments = true;
4415 match.notes.push_back("variadic: " +
4416 describeConversion(arg->type, expectedType));
4417 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), expectedType);
4418 match.argumentIsRef.push_back(false);
4419 match.arguments.push_back(std::move(arg));
4420 } else if (funcSymbol->isCVariadic) {
4421 if (argIsRef) {
4422 failed = true;
4423 failureReason = "C variadic arguments cannot be passed by ref";
4424 break;
4425 }
4426 auto promotedType = getCVariadicArgumentType(arg->type);
4427 if (!promotedType) {
4428 failed = true;
4429 failureReason = "type '" + renderTypeForUser(arg->type) +
4430 "' is not supported in C variadic arguments";
4431 break;
4432 }
4433 int cost = conversionCost(arg->type, promotedType);
4434 match.cost.push_back(cost);
4435 match.usedExtraArguments = true;
4436 match.notes.push_back("c variadic: " +
4437 describeConversion(arg->type, promotedType));
4438 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), promotedType);
4439 match.argumentIsRef.push_back(false);
4440 match.arguments.push_back(std::move(arg));
4441 } else {
4442 failed = true;
4443 failureReason = "too many arguments";
4444 break;
4445 }
4446 }
4447
4448 if (failed) {
4449 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
4450 "': " + failureReason);
4451 continue;
4452 }
4453
4454 if (expectedReturnType) {
4455 if (funcSymbol->returnType->toString() ==
4456 expectedReturnType->toString()) {
4457 match.returnCost = 0;
4458 match.notes.push_back("return: exact match");
4459 } else if (canConvert(funcSymbol->returnType, expectedReturnType)) {
4460 match.returnCost =
4461 conversionCost(funcSymbol->returnType, expectedReturnType);
4462 match.notes.push_back(
4463 "return: " +
4464 describeConversion(funcSymbol->returnType, expectedReturnType));
4465 } else {
4466 match.returnCost = 50;
4467 match.notes.push_back("return: incompatible with expected " +
4468 renderTypeForUser(expectedReturnType));
4469 }
4470 }
4471
4472 std::shared_ptr<FunctionSymbol> resolvedSymbol = funcSymbol;
4473 if (!funcSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty()) {
4474 resolvedSymbol = ensureGenericFunctionInstantiation(
4475 funcSymbol, orderedGenericBindings(genericBindings), node.span);
4476 if (!resolvedSymbol) {
4477 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
4478 "': failed to instantiate generic function");
4479 continue;
4480 }
4481
4482 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> remappedArgs;
4483 std::vector<bool> remappedRef;
4484 remappedArgs.reserve(match.arguments.size());
4485 remappedRef.reserve(match.argumentIsRef.size());
4486
4487 for (size_t i = 0; i < match.arguments.size(); ++i) {
4488 auto argClone = match.arguments[i] ? match.arguments[i]->clone() : nullptr;
4489 if (i < resolvedSymbol->parameters.size() && argClone) {
4490 auto expected = resolvedSymbol->parameters[i]->type;
4491 if (!resolvedSymbol->parameters[i]->is_ref) {
4492 argClone = wrapInCast(std::move(argClone), expected);
4493 }
4494 }
4495 remappedArgs.push_back(std::move(argClone));
4496 remappedRef.push_back(i < match.argumentIsRef.size()
4497 ? match.argumentIsRef[i]
4498 : false);
4499 }
4500
4501 match.arguments = std::move(remappedArgs);
4502 match.argumentIsRef = std::move(remappedRef);
4503 match.symbol = resolvedSymbol;
4504 }
4505
4506 if (resolvedSymbol->isUnsafe && !isUnsafeActive()) {
4507 blockedUnsafeMatch = resolvedSymbol;
4508 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*resolvedSymbol) +
4509 "': requires unsafe context");
4510 continue;
4511 }
4512 matches.push_back(std::move(match));
4513 }
4514
4515 if (matches.empty()) {
4516 if (blockedUnsafeMatch) {
4517 requireUnsafeContext(node.span, "unsafe function calls");
4518 return;
4519 }
4520
4521 error(
4522 node.callee_->span,
4523 "No matching overload for function '" + calleeParts.back() + "'. " +
4524 (rejectionNotes.empty() ? std::string() : ("Candidates: " + [&]() {
4525 std::string details;
4526 for (size_t i = 0; i < rejectionNotes.size(); ++i) {
4527 if (i != 0) {
4528 details += "; ";
4529 }
4530 details += rejectionNotes[i];
4531 }
4532 return details;
4533 }())));
4534 return;
4535 }
4536
4537 size_t bestIndex = 0;
4538 for (size_t i = 1; i < matches.size(); ++i) {
4539 if (compareCost(matches[i], matches[bestIndex])) {
4540 bestIndex = i;
4541 }
4542 }
4543
4544 std::vector<size_t> ambiguous = {bestIndex};
4545 for (size_t i = 0; i < matches.size(); ++i) {
4546 if (i == bestIndex) {
4547 continue;
4548 }
4549 if (!compareCost(matches[i], matches[bestIndex]) &&
4550 !compareCost(matches[bestIndex], matches[i])) {
4551 ambiguous.push_back(i);
4552 }
4553 }
4554
4555 if (ambiguous.size() > 1) {
4556 std::string message =
4557 "Call to function '" + calleeParts.back() + "' is ambiguous between ";
4558 for (size_t i = 0; i < ambiguous.size(); ++i) {
4559 if (i != 0) {
4560 message += i + 1 == ambiguous.size() ? " and " : ", ";
4561 }
4562 message +=
4563 "'" + renderFunctionSignature(*matches[ambiguous[i]].symbol) + "'";
4564 }
4565 message += ".";
4566 if (expectedReturnType) {
4567 message +=
4568 " Expected result type: '" + expectedReturnType->toString() + "'.";
4569 }
4570 message += " Candidate details: ";
4571 for (size_t i = 0; i < ambiguous.size(); ++i) {
4572 if (i != 0) {
4573 message += "; ";
4574 }
4575 message +=
4576 "'" + renderFunctionSignature(*matches[ambiguous[i]].symbol) + "' [";
4577 for (size_t j = 0; j < matches[ambiguous[i]].notes.size(); ++j) {
4578 if (j != 0) {
4579 message += ", ";
4580 }
4581 message += matches[ambiguous[i]].notes[j];
4582 }
4583 message += "]";
4584 }
4585 error(node.callee_->span, message);
4586 return;
4587 }
4588
4589 auto &best = matches[bestIndex];
4590 expressionStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundFunctionCall>(
4591 best.symbol, std::move(best.arguments), std::move(best.argumentIsRef),
4592 std::move(best.variadicPack)));
4593}

2918 }

2940 bool hasReturn = blockAlwaysReturns(boundBody.get());
2941
2942 if (!hasReturn && symbol->linkName == "main" &&
2943 symbol->returnType->isInteger()) {
2944 auto intType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int);
2945 auto lit = std::make_unique<BoundLiteral>("0", intType);

2947 std::make_unique<BoundReturnStatement>(std::move(lit)));
2948 hasReturn = true;
2949 }
2950
2951 if (!hasReturn && symbol->returnType->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Void) {
2952 auto kind = symbol->returnType->getKind();
2953 if (symbol->returnType->isInteger() || kind == zir::TypeKind::Float ||
2954 kind == zir::TypeKind::Bool) {
2955 std::string litVal = "0";
2956 if (kind == zir::TypeKind::Float)
2957 litVal = "0.0";
2958 else if (kind == zir::TypeKind::Bool)
2959 litVal = "false";
2960 auto lit = std::make_unique<BoundLiteral>(litVal, symbol->returnType);
2961 boundBody->statements.push_back(
2962 std::make_unique<BoundReturnStatement>(std::move(lit)));
2963 }
2964
2965 _diag.report(node.span, zap::DiagnosticLevel::Warning,
2966 "Function '" + node.name_ +
2967 "' has non-void return type but no return on some paths.");
2968 }
2969
2970 boundRoot_->functions.push_back(
2971 std::make_unique<BoundFunctionDeclaration>(symbol, std::move(boundBody)));

3890 (!currentClassStack_.empty() &&
3891 currentClassStack_.back() == classType->getName()) ||
3892 (fieldVis == Visibility::Protected && !currentClassStack_.empty());

3895 return;

4682 return;

4688 renderTypeForUser(expected) + "'");

4695 argRefs.push_back(node.args_[i]->isRef);

4697

3196 expr = makeFailableValueExpr(makeDefaultValueExpr(expectedValueType),
3197 expectedType);
